summary: Complete invoice management module with database schema, REST API CRUD operations, validation, and simple UI listing page using Laravel and MySQL
constraints: Use Laravel validation for API requests

tasks.title: Create invoices table migration and Invoice model
tasks.description: Create database migration for invoices table with required columns (id, invoice_number, customer_name, customer_email, amount, status, due_date, paid_at, created_at, updated_at). Create Invoice Eloquent model with fillable attributes and casts for dates.
acceptance_criteria: Migration creates table with all required columns: id, invoice_number (unique), customer_name, customer_email, amount (decimal), status (enum: pending, paid, overdue), due_date (date), paid_at (nullable datetime)
Invoice model has $fillable array with all fields except id/timestamps
Invoice model has $casts for due_date and paid_at as datetime
Migration includes indexes on invoice_number (unique) and status
test_cases: Migration runs without errors (php artisan migrate)
Invoice model can be created with factory
Invoice model casts work correctly for dates

tasks.title: Create InvoiceController with CRUD operations
tasks.description: Implement InvoiceController with index, show, store, update, and destroy methods following Laravel resource controller pattern. Use dependency injection for Invoice model.
acceptance_criteria: Controller has index() method returning paginated invoices
Controller has show($id) method returning single invoice
Controller has store(Request $request) method creating new invoice
Controller has update(Request $request, $id) method updating invoice
Controller has destroy($id) method soft-deleting invoice
All methods return JSON responses with proper HTTP status codes
Uses type-hinted Request and Invoice model injection

tasks.title: Create StoreInvoiceRequest validation and API routes
tasks.description: Create form request class for invoice validation with rules for invoice_number (unique), customer_name (required), customer_email (email), amount (numeric, positive), status (in:pending,paid,overdue), due_date (date, future). Register API routes in routes/api.php.
acceptance_criteria: StoreInvoiceRequest validates invoice_number as required, unique:invoices
customer_name is required, string, max:255
customer_email is required, email
amount is required, numeric, min:0.01
status is required, in:pending,paid,overdue
due_date is required, date, after:today
routes/api.php uses Route::apiResource('invoices', InvoiceController::class)
Validation errors return 422 with proper error messages
test_cases: Invalid data returns 422 with validation errors

tasks.title: Create invoice listing page with Blade
tasks.description: Create index.blade.php view for invoice listing page. Display table with columns: Invoice #, Customer, Amount, Status, Due Date, Actions. Include basic pagination.
acceptance_criteria: Page displays table with columns: Invoice #, Customer Name, Amount, Status, Due Date, Actions
Status has color-coded badges (pending=yellow, paid=green, overdue=red)
Amount is formatted as currency ($X,XXX.XX)
Due dates are formatted as MMM DD, YYYY
Pagination links are displayed when more than 15 records
Table is responsive on mobile devices
Empty state shows 'No invoices found' message
test_cases: Empty state shows when no invoices exist

tasks.title: Create Web InvoiceController and web routes
tasks.description: Create web controller for invoice views with index method. Add web routes in routes/web.php. Extend layout from existing app layout.
acceptance_criteria: Web InvoiceController has index() method returning invoices view with paginated data
routes/web.php has Route::get('/invoices', [InvoiceController::class, 'index'])->name('invoices.index')
Controller uses same Invoice model as API
View extends layouts.app or creates minimal layout
Page has proper title 'Invoices' in browser tab
Breadcrumb or header shows 'Invoice Management'

tasks.title: Create InvoiceController feature tests
tasks.description: Create comprehensive feature tests for all API endpoints testing CRUD operations, validation, and edge cases.
acceptance_criteria: Test covers GET /api/invoices (list)
Test covers GET /api/invoices/{id} (show)
Test covers POST /api/invoices with valid data
Test covers POST /api/invoices with invalid data (validation errors)
Test covers PUT /api/invoices/{id} (update)
Test covers DELETE /api/invoices/{id} (delete)
Tests use RefreshDatabase trait
All tests pass (php artisan test)

tasks.title: Create Invoice model unit tests and factory
tasks.description: Create InvoiceFactory for seeding and testing. Create unit tests for Invoice model including scopes, accessors, and relationships.
acceptance_criteria: InvoiceFactory generates valid invoice with fake data
Factory uses faker for customer_name, email, amount
Factory generates unique invoice_number
Unit test covers scopePending()
Unit test covers scopeOverdue()
Unit test covers scopePaid()
Unit test covers isOverdue() accessor
All unit tests pass
test_cases: Factory creates invoice with all fields populated
isOverdue returns true for past due_date
isOverdue returns false for future due_date
